statement: In every magma, Equation 3382 (`x * y = z * (x * (x * w))`) implies Equation 3482 (`x * x = y * ((y * x) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0934
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op x (op x w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op (op y x) y))
